grant_title: With Youth For Youth (WYFY) Grant Opportunities for Western New York
geographic_restrictions: Western New York (Allegany, Chautauqua, Cattaraugus, Erie, Genesee, Monroe, Niagara, Orleans, and Wyoming counties)
project_area: Out-of-school time and youth sports programs that incorporate youth voice, equitable access, and systems-level improvements
demographic_requirements: Youth programs serving ages 5-18 in Western New York, with a focus on youth voice and leadership
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include Western New York youth-serving organizations (501(c)(3) nonprofits, government agencies, schools) located in or serving the nine counties of Western New York. Funding supports out-of-school time and youth sports programs that integrate youth voice, equitable access, and systems-level improvements. Ineligible requests include tackle football programs, school-sanctioned athletic teams, traditional sporting goods equipment, multi-year funding, endowments, religious purposes, event attendance/sponsorship, and multiple applications from the same organization.
